exhibits.name: List of State Administrators
exhibits.notes: State franchise regulatory agencies — CA, CT, FL, HI, IL, IN, KY, ME, MD, MI, MN, NE, NY, NC, ND, OH, OK, OR, RI, SC, SD, TX, UT, VA, WA, WI

exhibits.name: Agents for Service of Process
exhibits.notes: State-by-state agents — CA, CT, HI, IL, MD, MI, MN, NY, ND, RI, SD, VA, WA, WI

exhibits.name: Table of Contents of Operations Manual
exhibits.notes: 249-page manual with 8 sections: Welcome (p1), Franchise Infrastructure (p6), Legal & Regulatory (p52), Business Development (p74), Operations (p137), Technology (p176), Quality Improvement (p193), Finances (p211), Additional Resources (p224)

exhibits.name: Financial Statements
exhibits.notes: Audited financial statements for year ended Dec 31, 2024. Auditor: Roos & McNabb CPA's PC (Fresno, CA). Clean/unqualified opinion. Balance sheet, income statement, changes in equity, cash flow, and 4 notes. Total assets $29,513. Net income $24,668. No going concern language.

exhibits.name: Franchise Agreement
exhibits.notes: 101 pages total. Main agreement (Articles 1–18) on pages 68–139. Sub-exhibits: Schedule 1 — Operating Territory (pp 140–142), Exhibit 1 — Owner and Spouse Agreement and Guaranty (pp 143–160), Exhibit 2 — Confidentiality Agreement (pp 161–162), Schedule 2 — Franchise Fee Acknowledgement (p 163), Schedule 3 — Statement of Owners (p 164), Exhibit 3 — Assignment of Telephone/Digital Media (p 165), Exhibit 4 — ACH Authorization Form (pp 165–166), Exhibit 5 — General Release (pp 167–168)

exhibits.name: List of Franchisees
exhibits.notes: There are no franchisees to report.

exhibits.name: List of Franchisees Who Have Left the System
exhibits.notes: There are no franchisees to report.

exhibits.name: State Specific Addenda
exhibits.notes: 32 pages. FDD Amendments: California (pp 172–173), Connecticut (p 174), Hawaii (p 175), Illinois (p 176), Maryland (p 177), Michigan (pp 177–178), Minnesota (pp 179–180), New York (pp 181–182), North Dakota (pp 183–184), Rhode Island (p 183), Virginia (p 183), Washington (p 184), Wisconsin (p 185). FA Amendments: California (p 187), Hawaii (pp 188–189), Illinois (pp 190–191), Maryland (pp 192–193), Minnesota (pp 194–196), New York (pp 197–198), North Dakota (pp 199–200), Washington (pp 201–202). Total 13 states.

exhibits.name: State Effective Dates
exhibits.notes: Lists states with franchise registration/filing requirements and their effective dates.

exhibits.name: Receipts
exhibits.notes: Two detachable copies. Return one signed copy to Daniel Deak, Home Halo Franchising, LLC.
